name: Shenzhen Xinyichang Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Xinyichang Technology Co., Ltd. is a China-based company specializing in the design, development, and sales of high-performance analog and mixed-signal integrated circuits (ICs). Their products are used in various applications, including power management, motor control, and sensor interfaces. Shenzhen Xinyichang Technology Co., Ltd. is headquartered in China.
